hero.title: Master Maths with Confidence
hero.subtitle: From Class 8 to Degree level, we simplify Maths, Hindi, and core subjects with clear concepts, step-by-step methods, and exam-focused preparation.

preview.title: Understanding beats memorizing.
preview.description: We focus on deep understanding rather than rote learning. Each concept is broken down into simple steps so students can solve problems independently and perform confidently in exams.

courses.title: Kerala Syllabus (Class 8–10)
courses.description: Complete Maths guidance with step-by-step problem solving and exam preparation.

courses.title: Higher Secondary (Plus One & Plus Two)
courses.description: Advanced Maths with focus on problem-solving techniques and board exam strategies.

courses.title: Degree Level Maths
courses.description: Clear understanding of higher-level topics with simplified explanations.

courses.title: Hindi & Other Subjects
courses.description: Support for language and additional subjects with structured learning.

reviews.name: Anjali S
reviews.text: Maths became so easy after joining. Concepts are explained clearly and I scored much better in exams.

reviews.name: Rahul K
reviews.text: Difficult problems are broken down step by step. Helped me gain confidence in Maths.

reviews.name: Fathima P
reviews.text: Very structured teaching. My child improved a lot in both understanding and marks.
